project.name: Shotpack Sample - PixVerse Generated Launch Film
project.textPolicy: Readable text and logos are added in Remotion only.
project.editPolicy: Keep edits restrained, cinematic, and product-first.
project.protagonistPolicy: One hero product per scene, with hands or silhouettes only when needed.
project.body: Signature Product Launch - Atmospheric Reveal 25-30 seconds 6 shots
project.artistNotes: Preserve negative space and keep motion measured.

scenes.objective: Opening wide shot. Let the still carry the composition and let motion stay restrained.
scenes.prompt: Quiet studio interior at first light, hero product resting on a central plinth, calm architectural atmosphere with generous negative space

scenes.objective: Detail shot. Keep movement minimal and elegant.
scenes.prompt: Brushed metal and textured fabric seen in a tactile close detail, grazing light revealing fine surface variations, intimate premium material study

scenes.objective: Primary hero shot. Candidate for upscale after approval.
scenes.prompt: Hero product isolated in a refined editorial composition, controlled practical lighting and soft atmosphere, premium reveal with clear silhouette

scenes.objective: Human interaction shot. Hands must stay believable.
scenes.prompt: Hands carefully placing and adjusting the product inside the studio, layered foreground shapes and measured motion, tactile interaction without showing readable text

scenes.objective: Use a longer shot to establish confidence and continuity.
scenes.prompt: Product in use within a calm interior setting, subtle reflections and atmospheric depth, poised momentum before the final reveal

scenes.objective: Closing hold. Lean into restraint and generous negative space.
scenes.prompt: Final frame of the product and surrounding space, warmer tones settling into the scene, calm premium ending image with lingering afterglow
